args.query: SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE (lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%') AND (lower(title) LIKE '%street%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%hype%');

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE (lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%') AND (lower(title) LIKE '%street%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%hype%');

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,13758,14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,13758,14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;
